texto: I spend a lot of time copying saxophone players and trumpet players. Not to say that it is not important to listen to guitar players, but there's so much music out there and so many possibilities. I like anyone who plays any instrument.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bill Frisell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I spend a lot of time copying saxophone players and trumpet players. Not to say that it is not im…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, time, guitar pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e guitar.

frase_original: I spend a lot of time copying saxophone players and trumpet players. Not to say that it is not important to listen to guitar players, but there's so much music out there and so many possibilities. I like anyone who plays any instrument.
